name: DailyStats
author: Wertzui123
description: This plugin sends a summary of the join activity of the day into your discord server!
readme_markdown:
# DailyStats This plugin sends a summary of the join activity of the day into your discord server!
The .phar can be found on poggit. # Config You must add the url of your webhook in the config file. # License and Copyright DailyStats is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For more information: https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0
© 2020 - 2023 Wertzui123 # Credits This plugin was developed for the WertzuiGames MCBE server network by Wertzui123 and later released publicly.
